name: phase-12-projects-first-class
goal: Make project area a system-derived field so the shipped project brief lights up (AC1+AC6), provide approval-gated fleet backfill (AC2), and ship the read-only /project open experience with a topic-aware project-grained brief (AC3+AC4). Hard gate AC11: glance-2-mvp brief sections 2 -> 4+ with metadata.area === 'glance-2-mvp'. Scope per Amendment 2026-06-10: slices A+B+C only.

userStories.title: AC1 read path: shared project-area resolution helper (core)
userStories.description: One shared helper in brief-assemblers.ts used by listActiveProjects and readProjectBySlug. Priority: fm.area -> fm.areas[0] (tolerated plural) -> permissive prose **Area**: line (bold variants, link any depth or plain slug) -> unresolved. Read fm.area_set_by. R9 divergence: fm wins, divergence exposed. Project type gains area?/areaSetBy? (no topics fields).
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests cover: fm-only, prose-link-only, prose-plain-slug, colon-inside-bold, unbolded, variable ../ depth, fm+prose agree, fm+prose disagree (fm wins + divergence), neither, areas: plural first entry, empty-string fm.area absent
Integration (real fs temp dir): prose-only-area fixture brief populates sections 2-5
npm run typecheck green; targeted tsx --test green

userStories.title: AC6: visible one-line message when area unresolved
userStories.description: metadata.areaNote with the plan's exact message when unresolved; formatProjectBriefMarkdown renders one italic line; R9 divergence warning rendered same way.
acceptanceCriteria: Area-less brief: markdown contains message line, JSON metadata carries it, no empty area-gated sections
Divergence case renders warning line; resolved-area brief has no note
Typecheck + targeted tests green

userStories.title: AC1 write path: creation-time area proposal in 3 skills (prose)
userStories.description: Optional propose-an-area step in general-project, create-prd, discovery SKILL.md: arete areas list, single best-guess with default + skip (R6, never blocking), on confirm write area: + area_set_by: creation.
acceptanceCriteria: All three SKILL.md carry the optional step with exact frontmatter keys
Docs-only; diff reviewed

userStories.title: AC11 HARD GATE: before/after section-count verification (read-only)
userStories.description: Run worktree-built CLI against /Users/john/code/arete-reserv (READ-ONLY): brief --project glance-2-mvp --json. Baseline 2 sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Section count >= 4 AND metadata.area === 'glance-2-mvp'
Live workspace untouched (git status unchanged)
MC3 shadow: section counts for all live projects pre/post recorded in diary
On failure: STOP build, diary entry, BLOCKED report

userStories.title: AC2: arete project backfill-area CLI (preview/--apply/--reset)
userStories.description: New project command group (project.ts + index.ts registration). Mirrors commitments backfill-area: preview default, 0.7 confidence floor via suggestAreaForMeeting(title + Background/Key Questions), --apply writes area: + area_set_by: backfill via yaml round-trip preserving body, qmd refresh + --skip-qmd, --reset clears only backfill-stamped, --json all exit paths. Core write helpers in project-area.ts with CLI call-sites.
acceptanceCriteria: Preview writes nothing (byte-identical READMEs); below-floor proposes nothing
Inference text = title + Background + Key Questions
--apply writes both keys, preserves body + nested fm (notion) through round-trip, idempotent on rerun
--reset clears only area_set_by==='backfill'
--json complete shapes for preview/apply/reset/error
Typecheck + targeted tests green

userStories.title: AC3: arete project open <name> read-only open flow
userStories.description: Resolve via entities.resolveAll(name,'project'); tie -> top-N disambiguation, never auto-load; archived -> note and stop; else brief + what's-new (getModified mtime: area meetings, fresher topics, newly-opened commitments). Zero writes. --json all paths.
acceptanceCriteria: Resolver tests: exact, fuzzy unique, tie -> top-N without loading, archived note
What's-new delta vs controlled fixture mtime
Zero-writes: workspace hash-tree identical end-to-end + counting StorageAdapter asserts no write/append/delete
Typecheck + targeted tests green

userStories.title: AC4: topic-aware project-grained brief (query, commitments union, siblings)
userStories.description: (a) wiki query += first lines of ## Key Questions / ## Background; (b) commitments projectSlug-first union with unclaimed area commitments, dedup by id; (c) sibling links ](../<slug>/ resolved active+archive (archived labeled) as small section.
acceptanceCriteria: Query assembly unit tests (with/without sections)
Union dedup tests: sibling-claimed excluded, unclaimed included, dedup by id
Sibling parse tests incl. archived label, trailing/no-trailing slash, unresolvable dropped
Integration: fixture brief includes topic section + project-grained commitments
Typecheck + targeted tests green

userStories.title: AC3: /project skill prose + skill-prose test
userStories.description: New packages/runtime/skills/project/SKILL.md: runs arete project open (no LLM in data path), asks on disambiguation, read-only (never writes README). Prose test in chef-orchestrator-skills.test.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: SKILL.md exists, frontmatter consistent with siblings, carries read-only + no-LLM + disambiguation rules
Prose test asserts those lines
Typecheck + targeted tests green

userStories.title: AC10/AC12 + wrap-tier verification
userStories.description: Full suite + typecheck, dark-code audit, cli-commands docs + AGENTS.md rebuild, AC12 rollback doc, dist rebuild for core+cli.
acceptanceCriteria: Full test suite green, typecheck green
Dark-code audit: every new export has production call-site
.agents/sources cli-commands updated + build:agents:dev run
Rollback documented; dist/ rebuilt and committed
